_comment: Parity input for discover-client-ci. `env` names env vars the script reads (FIX_SRC + OUT_PATH resolved to test tempdir; TASK_ID_SLUG passed through). `tree` is the synthesized fix-src directory the script walks — path -> file body. Exercises workflow discovery (2 hits), package.json script discovery (dedupes the workflow's lint, adds typecheck + test), and the QUALITY / SKIP / MUTATE filters (echo hello dropped by QUALITY miss).

tree..github/workflows/ci.yml:
name: ci
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: build
        run: pnpm run build
      - name: lint
        run: pnpm run lint
      - name: skip
        run: echo hello
